description: Check duplicate labels in Contingengy (CON) file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr, dnum = chkcntduplicon(confile)

return_values.name: dnum
return_values.description: Total number of duplicated contingency labels in the contingency file. (output; 0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for function not met.
